title: Rate limiter module is dead code — not wired into router
description: ratelimit.rs defines RateLimiter and rate_limit_middleware but nothing in server.rs creates a RateLimiter instance or adds the middleware to the inbox routes. The module compiles but has zero effect. Wire it into the inbox POST routes in server::router().
close_reason: All quick fixes applied: markdown rendering, feed dedup, rate limiter wired in, error logging, shared HTTP client, clippy+rustfmt clean
